description: A Persian-inspired tactical RPG where enemies wake when they see you. Lead four pahlavans across one connected road, manage scarce recovery, and try Command Divs, Call Pharhad, Send Dastur Z, or Pahlavan Chess for alternate tactical chaos.

name: Chasing Whiskers
description: Catch cats in this cozy adventure game! After falling into Catworld through an interdimensional portal, you must find your missing cat by completing errands for Ponpon, the local Cat Café owner. Chase, catch and collect until you can find your way home! This game is made by students.

name: 巴比伦:人与人之战
description: A cyberpunk visual novel about AI, humanity, and the meaning of life. Follow a silver-haired android in a divided futuristic Babylon, where every truth reveals a deeper conflict between humans and artificial beings.

name: TBH: Task Bar Hero
description: The ultimate tiny idle RPG! Adorable pixel heroes are waiting to join your adventure — from your taskbar. Fight off the boredom of work and daily life with diverse classes, skills, items, and builds!

name: Hop Hop! Donut
description: Strap on balloons and soar through the skies as Donut the corgi in this adorable 2D platformer! Battle evil cats, dodge deadly obstacles, and rescue your kidnapped owner in a whimsical adventure inspired by Balloon Fight.

name: Ex Libris
description: Ex Libris is a library-crawling RPG adventure set in a 16th century monastery, inspired by the writings of Umberto Eco, Francois Rabelais, and Clark Ashton Smith.

name: Dark Room
description: This is Dark Room, an indie game made by an 11-year-old in which a ball traverses a procedurally generated maze with a flashlight in hand and attempts to escape. This game is great for people who like surprises around every corner.

name: Farmnana Defence
description: ▎ Defend your farm with magical bananas! Collect and enhance 20+ bananas across 5 tiers, build your farm by day, and survive monster waves by night. Face 5 epic bosses in 25 waves and endless Infinite Mode.

name: PATCHED
description: PATCHED is about a lonely, abandoned doll who awakens in an empty, decrepit factory. In search of answers, they begin to explore the factory and piece themselves back together, encountering other dolls along the way.

name: Earth Forge
description: COLLECT, UPGRADE, UNLOCK AND NAVIGATE Single player adventure gameplay involves mining for materials, finding and collecting enough minerals in a randomly generated world to unlock upgrades. The upgraded player can then navigate through mines and dungeons avoiding bats to reach treasure chests.

name: Tiny Catcher
description: Tiny Catcher is a fishing game where you can keep it open in a floating window mode, so you can place it wherever you want while doing other things on your PC. The idea is to have something cozy running in the background while you work, study, or just relax.

name: Drink Water!
description: A simple and clean desktop bottle-companion that reminds you to drink water and stay hydrated throughout the day. Track your daily water intake, monitor your streak, and keep a little (or big) pixel-art bottle always on your desktop.

name: Gunk
description: Gunk is an endless rouge-lite wave survival game.  Fight off hordes of enemies and level up your skills to increase your chance of survival, and save the world from the Gunk invasion.  Their only weakness is rocks, and you are the last hope for humanity.  Can you save us all?

name: Into The Deep
description: Into The Deep - a rhythm roguelike game where you must dive into the ocean and clear it from music-corrupted ocean creatures!

name: The Interdependent View-Dimension: Zena
description: Meet Zena—your new 3D anime desktop buddy! Just leave the game running to collect free in-game rewards, and use them to dress her up, unlock cute expressions, or give her gifts to level up your bond! Psst… more fun interactive moments with Zena are on the way—keep an eye out!

name: Paul Bunyan Back to Bangor
description: Unleash the legend in this 3D Action RPG. Explore the American frontier as Paul Bunyan, collecting mystical Amber to fuel your transformation from a nimble woodsman into a colossal giant. Wield an axe and master the scale-shifting power of a folk hero to protect the land from primordial threats.

name: Hearing Voices
description: Hearing Voices is a unique indie short horror experience where you will need to put your listening and deduction skills to the test to solve puzzles. Mistakes have consequences.

name: Cultist
description: Cultist is card game about begining of the religions and the way they grow, interact and even become immortal. Can you outgrow the world that contains yourself and become much bigger?

name: Damn Exam
description: You thought your job was to educate the youth? Think again. You are here to keep them in line. These brats have no intention of doing the exam the right way, instead they will just cheat, cheat, cheat! You are the last line of defense and must catch every cheating student.

name: Tellyport
description: Play as Sally, the granddaughter of a brilliant and eccentric inventor, who invited you to explore her 70s lab, filled with unique inventions. Solve puzzles by crossing TV screens that alter your gravity, size, or both. Observation, manipulation, and thinking are key to progressing!

name: Warring Clans
description: This card game uses shapes, colors and rock-paper-scissors mechanisms to score points. There are three land and character types. Simple to learn, hard to master.

name: The Wheelchair Man
description: Steal $5,000 from an abandoned apartment complex while avoiding a demented man.

name: BLOK
description: BLOK is a free puzzle platformer made by students at Code & Circuit, a local STEM non-profit. Carry colored blocks to matching buttons, smash through walls with a boxing glove, and swing across gaps with a grappling plunger across a tutorial and five student-designed levels.

name: Sushi Courier!
description: This is Sushi Courier! A game where you build relationships, give back to the Community, and of course... Make Sushi!

name: Bear Murderer
description: In a village where someone dies every night, you play as a detective who must examine the bodies, talk to residents, and spot the subtle signs of deception to uncover the truth. Gather clues amid the ongoing deaths and see through the lies. Doubt, deduce, and identify the killer.

name: SINDIKAT
description: SINDIKAT is an online board game about business and money: buy companies, upgrade assets, collect rent, and outplay your friends in the fight for full control of the city.

name: 67 Minutes in Heaven
description: Your neighbor invites you on a double date, setting you up with the new girl from out of town. After sneaking into an abandoned house, your neighbor suggests everyone play a game, 67 Minutes in Heaven.

name: Tragedy is approaching
description: A first-person survival game set in a post-Soviet wasteland. Explore abandoned locations, fight the infected, scavenge resources, and build a base to survive

name: ExerciseSimulator Vol.1 - Hustle and Exercise in a Cat-Type Rodeo Machine -
description: An interactive simulator and desktop mascot where a middle-aged man (Ojisan) works out as hard as he can on a rodeo machine! Take control of the machine and give him the ultimate workout.

name: All Lanes Must Exit
description: Build a highway interchange to connect all the roads. Don't go over-budget and don't have traffic jams. Can you complete all the levels? Yes, easily, it's not a particularly demanding game.

name: GoatBrains
description: Goatbrains is a casual trivia game combining quiz challenges, short educational segments, an energetic endless runner, and a pressure-free meditation mode, offering multiple ways to learn, play, and unwind.

name: Drawn Together
description: Doodle, communicate, and play your own drawing games with friends using your own desktop digital whiteboards!

name: Blank Canvas
description: You are a painter, living in modest apartment. Paintings are your passion. Empty canvas awaits your imagination. Enter the blank world of the canvas and reveal the hidden world around you and find out what the passion wants to reveal.

name: 火龙传奇
description: 全新传奇《火龙传奇》以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！与兄弟并肩征战，从新手小白到全服霸主，书写属于你的强者传奇！

name: 大航海征途
description: 《大航海征途》是一款航海主题的策略游戏，背景设定为架空的中世纪魔幻世界。在这个世界里，您可以：从单帆船到飞空舰队，亲手打造您的无敌舰队，全服首位建造者更可获得【大航海家】尊享称号;招募传奇船长，借助他们独特的技能纵横四海，书写属于您的航海传奇;经营各港口珍稀货物，通过独特的“订单系统”把握商机，每一次决策都可能让您富甲一方;巧妙搭配各具特色的船长技能，组建专属于您的王牌舰队，掌控海洋霸主的权柄;在公海激战与排名赛中一决高下，用实力证明谁是真正的海上霸主，缔造属于您的辉煌时代。

name: 神游课本
description: 这是一本献给所有小朋友以及童心未泯者的互动解谜书！你将重回儿时的课桌，在语文、数学、英语的课本中畅游。动动脑袋，点点鼠标，破解谜题，收获乐趣！书里还有各种趣味插画和故事，大小朋友们都来试试吧！

name: Supreme War God
description: 经典1.80版重现，经久不衰，装备无限自由打，神装满地爆！在这款原汁原味的MMORPG游戏中，你将与同伴尽情冒险，成就一段强者的传奇成长之路。

name: Nexus Legacy
description: Rebuild civilization from a single planet in Nexus Legacy, a persistent sci-fi 4X MMO. Colonize worlds, manage resources, research technologies, command fleets, forge alliances, and fight for control of a living galaxy.

name: Player's New World
description: Player New World blends desktop pets, idle growth, dimensional summons and dungeon adventure. A cute pet joins work/study; idle to regain stamina, summon allies, delve deeper and grow stronger. Trade all: characters, levels, gear, skills—no binding.

name: Wyvern Warriors
description: Wyvern Warriors is a third-person flying action game focused on fast-paced multitasking and aerial combat.

name: Apology Video
description: An FMV Choose-Your-Own-Adventure that'll leave you wanting to like and subscribe!

name: Xeno Strike
description: Build your collection, construct decks, and duel against other players in a sci-fi card battler.

name: Dustin Sunset
description: A post-apocalyptic world, a bastion of hope, the wasteland gangs united to destroy it, and only one man crazy enough to try to save it. Dustin Sunset is a vertical shoot ’em up with a touch of bullet hell and a whole lot of love, made by fans of the genre for fans of the genre.

name: Time to Love
description: Time to Love is a 2D, top-down, co-op roguelike centered around two protagonists trying to keep reality from collapsing. You will traverse from timeline to timeline, strengthening yourself from each unique branch, seeking to bind what little remains after past mistakes.

name: GlowCore
description: GlowCore is a singleplayer progression game focused on resource gathering and gradual world expansion. In the center of the world lies the GlowCore. The goal is to expand the world by feeding the GlowCore with wood and other resources.

name: Animal UFO
description: A chaotic UFO racing action game where up to 16 animals scramble to steal candy.

name: 红线
description: "Red Line" is a card-based turn-based science fiction storytelling game. Players take on the role of the director of a "containment facility" located in Antarctica, battling powerful contained entities and various anomalous lifeforms through card-based combat, in search of the truth behind the story

name: Classic: Snake
description: A tribute to the timeless snake game. Use arrow keys to guide the snake, eat food to grow longer, and avoid crashing into walls or yourself. Unlock achievements, compete on global leaderboards. Simple to pick up, impossible to put down.

name: Alehundred
description: A crossplay multiplayer platformer where you're 10cm tall inside giant historical dioramas. Race through seven eras from 1956 Italy to 300 BC Alexandria, collect coins, claim Magic Gems, and compete with up to 8 players across PC, Android, and iOS. VR standalone support coming post-launch.

name: Ship It
description: Welcome to Ship It Co.! As a Sorting Specialist, grab incoming packages off the conveyor and stack them in the elevator. Build stable loads, hit Send, and meet your shift quota before time runs out. Just don’t let your friendly AI manager, Shippy, catch you falling behind!

name: Goalkeeper Journey
description: Step into the gloves of a rising goalkeeper, starting your journey at local clubs and working your way to the world’s biggest football stages.

name: RPG: Fire Keeper
description: Fire keeper, guard the spark, reap the fire. Read books, seek stories and truths. Communicate with people, offer help and healing. Make choices, face the dying gasp or sin.

name: PetDoctor
description: A cozy veterinary clinic simulator where you treat animals, expand your hospital, and build a trusted care center.

name: Eterspire
description: Eterspire is a cozy old-school MMORPG where skill and dedication define your progression. Grind for gear, explore the vibrant world of Aetera, discover new content every two weeks, and join a growing, welcoming community in a free-to-play MMO with PC and mobile crossplay.

name: The Reserve
description: Fast paced modern military FPS. Diverse game modes for fun PvP action or PvE game play with co-op mode with friends plowing through bots while hitting the mission objectives. Experience Rank up system along with daily challenges to expedite your ranking up progress. Can be played in FP or TP.

name: Minkle's Masks of Mayhem
description: A cosy 2.5D micro management game, situated in a magical fantasy universe. Play as Minkle, and help him arrive safely at his destination by keeping his troublesome masks at bay.

name: Earth Swordsman
description: Adventure / puzzle game inspired by minimalist comic book art mixed with DnD fantasy elements.

name: Les jeux du cycle
description: Les Jeux du Cycle turns your Bluetooth FTMS trainer into a cycling party game: sprint, dodge, team up, add bots, and outplay friends across 25+ minigames.

name: Farm RPG
description: Farm RPG is a menu based farming RPG/MMO. Build your farm, grow crops, fish, craft, and explore. Unlock a variety of exciting daily activities as you progress. Engage with helpful townsfolk and collaborate with fellow players in a vibrant community for trading and teamwork.

name: Dig You Fools
description: A casual game about delving the depths of the earth.

name: Lusófona Games Collection 2025
description: Lusófona Games Collection 2025 brings you five unique, student and staff made games from Lusófona University. Dive into creative prototypes packed with passion, gameplay innovation, and behind-the-scenes commentary from the next generation of game developers!

name: Old But Gold
description: A grandpa promised to pick up his granddaughter on her first day of school. He rehearses scanning QR codes again and again. But facing the screen alone, everything falls apart. After playing, maybe you'll think of an elder in your life — and say: Take your time. No rush.

name: Throne of Desire
description: "Throne of Desire" is a 3D open-world adult MMORPG. When divine patterns run wild, the arrogant Saint will completely submit to you. Trade battlefield blood and sweat for the most depraved bedroom demands — unlocking dynamic sex scenes , turning her into a cock-addicted lost in endless pleasure.

name: Escape Line
description: Yandere · Monster Romance · Y/N game · Philosophical · Sci-Fi · Visual Novel Shipwrecked and stripped of memory, you awaken on a fog-shrouded island with nothing but the aid of two sirens — so, what's the price?

name: Foundation Typer
description: This is a martial arts inspired typing dojo designed to build REAL keyboard control, accuracy, rhythm, and flow from the ground up. Train through structured lessons, belt progression, finger-specific drills, graduation challenges, and adaptive practice systems under the guidance of Sifu Key-Ro.

name: The 4th Coming
description: Embark on an epic MMORPG adventure in The 4th Coming! Inspired by classics like Diablo and Ultima Online. The action of the game takes place in a medieval-fantasy world where the player plays a character with his characteristics, skills, spells and equipments.

name: Onigiri
description: Onigiri is an MMO Action RPG with a fast weapon changing battle system. Join a party of other players or travel with 8 NPC companions on your journey. With simple controls, you can dive into the thrilling world of Onigiri. Switch between weapons to battle through the Youkai.

name: Mebula
description: Mebula, seal Mebulies, train them and fight to be the best!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: PlanetSprite
description: PlanetSprite is an online MMO where you create your own character, customize, interact, trade and play with other fellow players!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Puzzle Wizards
description: Save Fairyland from the SoloGro™ Bros in this cozy co-op MMO from the creators of Puzzle Pirates! Adventure with friends to earn loot, furniture and clothes. Build and decorate your village and join a Wizards' Guild to help restore the world. Play cross-platform on Steam, iOS and Android.

name: Eden Eternal-聖境伝説
description: The return of classic MMORPG ! Global Direct Operations!Rich gameplays and multiple updates. Ride adorable alpaca and start your adventure with players worldwide!

name: Drakensang Online
description: Explore a world of magic and intrigue, filled with terrifying monsters and ferocious enemies! Discover the mysteries of Dracania, battle against the forces of evil and become a hero in Drakensang Online, the award-winning action RPG.

name: 天羽传奇Online
description: 《天羽传奇Online》是一款Q版仿3D即时战斗类MMORPG，温馨可爱的东方武侠画风，丰富的纸娃娃变装，发型、头饰、衣服、背饰、尾巴自由DIY自己喜欢的造型，超萌宠物、骑宠设计，充满温馨的门派、部落，仿3D即时战斗、队伍群P、部落战争……

name: War and Peace
description: Welcome to the true world of strategy! This game is a unique project created specifically for players seeking an exciting pastime and a test of leadership and strategic skills.

name: Starship Traders MMO
description: A sci-fi sandbox MMO where players explore galaxies, hunt aliens, and form corporations to combine forces for larger opportunities.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 天羽Online
description: 「天羽Online」是一款 2D 奇幻 MMORPG 遊戲，免費開玩。 寵物養成：捕抓怪物為寵物，並培養牠們成長，助您徵戰沙場。 自由換裝：自由 DIY 角色外觀，隨心所欲設計髮型、頭飾、衣服、背飾和尾巴。

name: WWII Online
description: WWII Online is a massive, persistent free-to-play MMO FPS driven entirely by players. Fight as Army, Air, or Naval forces and earn Victory Points to access more units. One global server. No scripts. Real outcomes. No zones. Huge world (300,000 km²). ENLIST NOW!

name: Continent of the Ninth Golden
description: Continent of the Ninth Golden is an action MMORPG. Players take part in the game as heroes of Blenheim to stand against Nefer, an evil villain trying to open a gate to the Netherworld and swarm the land with his infernal legion.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: ASURA
description: MMORPG 2D pixel game by a Thai development team that has been in service for over 15 years and is still developing continuously.

name: Definya 2D MMORPG
description: Fantasy 2D Retro Pixel Anime MMORPG — Crafting, Open-World, Sandbox — PVP & PvE

name: 神州豪侠
description: 《神州豪侠》是一款备受欢迎的卡牌游戏，其以古代武林为主题，让玩家身临其境地体验古代武侠的精彩与魅力。在游戏中，玩家可以扮演一名武侠，在不断的修炼和战斗中提升自己的实力，最终成为一名真正的武侠豪杰。除了传统的武学修炼和战斗系统，游戏中还有众多有趣的玩法，如悬赏任务、帮派战争等等，让玩家享受到更多的游戏乐趣。游戏画面精美，场景细致，音效逼真，让玩家仿佛置身于一个真实的武侠世界中。同时，游戏的剧情也非常精彩，让玩家感受到了古代武林的风云变幻和豪情壮志。
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 真修世界（Fairy Land）
description: "Fairy Land" is a massively multiplayer online game (MMORPG). The game provides players with a lot of different quality equipment, and the pursuit of high-level (or best) equipment is one of the most important goals for players in the game.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Only Fortress
description: Become the hero of your own fortress! Defend, customize, and explore in this PvP & PvM strategy game. Unleash your skills, lead your troops, and dominate in the battles. Build, fight, and conquer on the open world cross-platform online game!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Dark Odyssey
description: Dark Odyssey, an epic online rpg game that features idle playing, dungeon challenges, boss fights, character enhancing and customizations. Get ready to embark on a dark and thrilling journey, increase your power, team up with other players and save the world!

name: Dynast.io
description: Dynast.IO is a cool survival game with RPG elements. Build a base, get resources, craft weapons and survive with your friends.

name: World of Rune
description: World of Rune is an MMORPG game with tons of different characters and mystical cute pets. You can play as a Swordsman, Mage, Archer and Cleric.

name: Sword Art Online: Integral Factor
description: Aim to conquer Aincrad with Kirito and Asuna

name: Heartwood Online
description: Heartwood Online is a cross-platform free-to-play MMO. Explore a vast world filled with adventure where you choose your own path. Immerse yourself in crafting, trade, PvP & PvE battles, guilds, politics, and a thriving player economy.

name: Nothorian
description: Nothorian is a dark [MMOJRPG-Single player], a role-playing game in a vast universe, focused on action.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: 幻世九州
description: 《幻世九州》是一款承袭国韵传说的MMORPG，问道于乱世莽荒恢弘遗迹，多线修炼突破经脉转生，结盟爽战史诗猛兽，重炼极品法宝武器，御灵宠幻化坐骑随性，邂逅正缘传功双修，上古九州由你谱写！

description: Retro nostalgic big voyage game, dream back to the road of great voyage! Exploration, management, trade, piracy and war are constant topics. With wisdom and luck, gradually build a powerful fleet. Set sail, take the Golden Silk Road again, and reproduce the great voyage!

name: Nautical Dispute
description: Retro nostalgic big voyage game, dream back to the road of great voyage! Exploration, management, trade, piracy and war are constant topics. With wisdom and luck, gradually build a powerful fleet. Set sail, take the Golden Silk Road again, and reproduce the great voyage!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Tales of Yore
description: Tales of Yore is a light-weight 2D MMORPG featuring all your RPG tropes in one casual package. Explore, complete quests and slay evil monsters to write your Tale. Alternatively make yourself a nice purple hat and show off. The choice is yours!

name: 三界
description: Experience the love and hate of cultivators in a completely fictional world.

name: 爆战联盟
description: "Ghoul League" is a doomsday treasure brush shooting game. Any corpse ghost seen in the game can be caught against humans. "Two person game is the future". The game also supports multi person mode. You can break through customs and brush suits with your partners!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Cronous
description: Cronous Online is a large MMORPG that features character growth and confrontation as its main features. Players can enhance their own strength in various ways to confront the demons of Cronous continent.

name: GraalOnline Era
description: Era is a modern 2D action MMO RPG. Purchase weapons and work with a gang to compete in activities such as special events, base capturing and PvP battles in the Spar Complex, or start your own gang and chart your own path!

name: Trimurti Online
description: Relive the classic gameplay of an old-school MMORPG. Select a class that suits your style and join your friends to explore the vast world of Trimurti Online. Upgrade your equipment and maximize your skills, face monsters and bosses, conquer dungeons.

name: The Magic Land
description: The Magic Land is a massive online role-playing game where people live in a magical world of adventures.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Kalpa of Sword
description: 《剑气劫》是一款新国风题材的PVPVE游戏，生存斗法是游戏的唯一目标！ 游戏开放全地图探索掉落，装备全靠自己刷。但仙途险恶，无论是奇魔异兽还是路过的修士，皆可成为狩猎的目标。成王败寇，修仙乱世当以实力为尊，望各位道友好自珍重！

name: Familiars.io
description: Gather Familiars and do turn-based battles in this atmospheric little MMO! Quickly max-out your Familiars and conquer challenging dungeons. Battle other players, or just press the "Howdy" button to greet them!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Grudge
description: Grudge is a thrilling fantasy MMO sandbox where your choices shape a living world. Explore, fight, build, and conquer in an adventure that fuses MMORPG depth, survival crafting, and real-time strategy. Forge your legacy alone or with friends—will you rise as a hero, a warlord, or a legend?
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: ASTRAL TALE-星界神話
description: "ASTRAL TALE"- Myth of the Stars," a classic Japanese MMORPG, is now officially operating worldwide. A brand-new profession has been introduced, allowing players to embark on a unique journey across the stars together!

name: Der Geistermeister
description: Textbasiertes Rollenspiel mit Creator für eigene Abenteuer!

name: Titan Revenge
description: Set in the vast expanse of Norse mythology, this MMORPG thrusts you into a world on the brink of apocalypse. As an intrepid hero, you must navigate the realms of the Aesir and Vanir, battling fearsome giants, mythical beasts, and treacherous gods.

name: Conquest of Empires 2
description: We insist on fair competition, and focus on testing players' strategic intelligence and teamwork. We are committed to creating a user-friendly game, so that every player can easily enter the game, enjoy the glory of the ancient civilization, and feel the endless fun of conquest.

name: EOS RAGNAROK
description: Echo of Soul is a free-to-play Massively Multiplayer Online Role-Playing Game with a fast-paced action combat, various character customizations and no subscription fee required. Travel the vast open world, compete in PvP modes, and explore EoS.

name: 大话战国Online
description: 《大话战国Online》是一款Q版仿3D即时战斗类MMORPG，取材于中国“战国七雄”历史时期，温馨可爱的东方武侠画风，超萌宠物、骑宠设计，充满温馨的门派、部落，仿3D即时战斗、队伍群P、部落战争、国战争霸……文化部推荐第三批适合未成年人网游产品之一。
